jaxlibxc
  • API Reference
  • Meta-GGA Functionals
  • View page source

Meta-GGA Functionals

Meta-Generalized Gradient Approximation functional implementations.

SCAN Exchange

SCAN (Strongly Constrained and Appropriately Normed) meta-GGA exchange.

Translated from maple/mgga_exc/mgga_x_scan.mpl.

References

Sun, Ruzsinszky, Perdew, PRL 115, 036402 (2015)

SCAN Correlation

SCAN meta-GGA correlation functional.

Translated from maple/mgga_exc/mgga_c_scan.mpl + includes.

The SCAN correlation interpolates between PBE correlation (with Hu-Langreth beta) and a special e0 term via the f_alpha switching function.

f = f_pbe + f_alpha(alpha_c) * (e0 - f_pbe)

References

Sun, Ruzsinszky, Perdew, PRL 115, 036402 (2015)
